RPI Product Recommendation

RPI Engage Legacy™

Three buckets for the money you won't spend in your lifetime.
Children • Care • Charity

The Legacy Question

Most people don't spend everything they have. The question isn't whether you'll leave a legacy — it's whether you'll leave the one you wanted.
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
Pillar 1

CHILDREN

Your heirs. Children, grandchildren, siblings, designated people.

  • Named beneficiary transfers (no probate)
  • Step-up in basis on appreciated assets
  • Inherited IRA 10-yr rule (SECURE Act)
  • Roth conversions for tax-free inheritance
  • Life insurance as leveraged legacy vehicle
🏥
Pillar 2

CARE

Your own protection. What happens if YOU need long-term care before your heirs inherit?

  • LTC policies with inflation riders
  • Hybrid life/LTC products
  • Annuity income riders with LTC enhancements
  • Self-funded care reserve
  • Aging-in-place vs facility planning
⛪
Pillar 3

CHARITY

Your causes. Church, foundation, school, community organizations that matter to you.

  • Qualified Charitable Distributions (QCD from IRA)
  • Donor-Advised Funds (DAF)
  • Charitable Remainder Trusts (CRT)
  • Named beneficiary of Traditional IRA (IRD-free)
  • Life insurance with charity as beneficiary
“A legacy isn't what you had. It's what you passed on. And how you passed it on.”

Side-by-Side Comparison

Populate: Legacy vehicle comparison grid. Columns: Vehicle (Life Insurance, Annuity, Trust, CRT, DAF), Current Cost, Tax Treatment at Death, Control During Life, Flexibility to Change, Best For (Children / Care / Charity). Show which vehicle solves which pillar.

Carrier Illustrations

Populate: In-force illustrations of existing life policies (what they project at death) + proposed replacement/enhancement illustrations if recommending 1035 exchange or new coverage. Year-by-year death benefit projection + cash value growth.

Your legacy, your intent.

RPI Engage Legacy™ is how we translate your wishes into the right vehicles so they actually happen the way you want.

(888) 620-8587
